correspondio: Sorry for not saying that earlier.  Chat only just enabled on my account.
correspondio: Also, sorry for the misclick undo request.  Had some interface issues and was trying to disable 'Zen mode'!
correspondio: Move 34 - Was atari correct, or just play on the bottom?
correspondio: Move 38 - Is L3 too slow?  N5 looks like its ok shape and threatens to disconnect, but has an issue at m4
correspondio: Move 44 - Connect directly and save potential of cutting at k2?
correspondio: Move 50 - There's a weakness at h3.  What's the best way to come out?
C[correspondio: Is there a way to exploit this? C13 is normal. Or just extend along the top side?
C[correspondio: Seems pretty over-concentrated and black has sente to defend the top right.  Maybe k16 should have been around s16?
C[correspondio: Still not clear whether s4 is big enough.  Maybe I can sacrifice d17 and get p11 or c10 as well.  Or maybe just stay connected on the top side!
C[correspondio: More knights moves!! What is big? B12/b11, e11/e10, l16, s17, p11??
correspondio: Is there a cut at d13?

C[correspondio: Is f10 working, and is it bigger than pushing at b12?  This black centre is looking much more plausible than 10 moves ago, but still open from the bottom (and top if I pretend k16 isn't so weak)
C[correspondio: Weird. Why hane and then not connect?
C[correspondio: Was h9 not big? Or l9? Options seem to be h10, l9 or l14
C[correspondio: After g4, pretty sure black can't block at g3 - otherwise, L1 (f5 isn't real anymore)
